sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: Prithee, peace.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: [to ANTONIO] He receives comfort like cold porridge.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: [to SEBASTIAN] The visitor will not give him o'er so.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Look he’s winding up the watch of his wit. By and by it
will strike.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Look he’s winding up the watch of his wit. By and by it
will strike.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Look he’s winding up the watch of his wit. By and by it
will strike.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: [to ALONSO] Sir—

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: [to ANTONIO] One. Tell.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: [to ANTONIO] One. Tell.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
When every grief is entertained that’s offered,
Comes to th' entertainer—

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: A dollar.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Dolor comes to him, indeed. You have spoken truer than
you purposed.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Dolor comes to him, indeed. You have spoken truer than
you purposed.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: You have taken it wiselier than I meant you should.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: [to ALONSO] Therefore, my lord—

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
[to SEBASTIAN] Fie, what a spendthrift is he of his
tongue!

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: [to GONZALO] I prithee, spare.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: Well, I have done. But yet—

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: Well, I have done. But yet—

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: [to ANTONIO] He will be talking.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Which, of he or Adrian, for a good wager, first begins
to crow?

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Which, of he or Adrian, for a good wager, first begins
to crow?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: The old cock.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: The cockerel.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Done. The wager?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Done. The wager?

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: A laughter.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: A match!

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text: Though this island seem to be desert—

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: [to SEBASTIAN] Ha, ha, ha!

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: So you’re paid.

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text: Uninhabitable and almost inaccessible—

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Yet—

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text: Yet—

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: He could not miss ’t.

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text:
It must needs be of subtle, tender, and delicate
temperance.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Temperance was a delicate wench.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Ay, and a subtle, as he most learnedly delivered.

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text: The air breathes upon us here most sweetly.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: As if it had lungs, and rotten ones.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Or as ’twere perfumed by a fen.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: Here is everything advantageous to life.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: True. Save means to live.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: True. Save means to live.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Of that there’s none, or little.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: How lush and lusty the grass looks! How green!

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: How lush and lusty the grass looks! How green!

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: The ground indeed is tawny.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: With an eye of green in ’t.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: He misses not much.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: No, he doth but mistake the truth totally.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
But the rarity of it is—which is indeed almost beyond
credit—

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: As many vouched rarities are.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
That our garments, being, as they were, drenched in the
sea, hold notwithstanding their freshness and glosses,
being rather new-dyed than stained with salt water.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
If but one of his pockets could speak, would it not say
he lies?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Ay, or very falsely pocket up his report.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Methinks our garments are now as fresh as when we put
them on first in Afric, at the marriage of the king’s
fair daughter Claribel to the King of Tunis.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
'Twas a sweet marriage, and we prosper well in our
return.

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text:
Tunis was never graced before with such a paragon to
their queen.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: Not since widow Dido’s time.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Widow! A pox o' that! How came that “widow” in? Widow
Dido!

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Widow! A pox o' that! How came that “widow” in? Widow
Dido!

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Widow! A pox o' that! How came that “widow” in? Widow
Dido!

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Widow! A pox o' that! How came that “widow” in? Widow
Dido!

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
What if he had said “widower Aeneas” too? Good Lord,
how you take it!

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text:
“Widow Dido” said you? You make me study of that. She
was of Carthage, not of Tunis.

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text:
“Widow Dido” said you? You make me study of that. She
was of Carthage, not of Tunis.

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text:
“Widow Dido” said you? You make me study of that. She
was of Carthage, not of Tunis.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: This Tunis, sir, was Carthage.

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text: Carthage?

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: I assure you, Carthage.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
His word is more than the miraculous harp. He hath
raised the wall and houses too.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
His word is more than the miraculous harp. He hath
raised the wall and houses too.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: What impossible matter will he make easy next?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
I think he will carry this island home in his pocket
and give it his son for an apple.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
And sowing the kernels of it in the sea, bring forth
more islands.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: Ay.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Why, in good time.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
[to ALONSO] Sir, we were talking that our garments seem
now as fresh as when we were at Tunis at the marriage
of your daughter, who is now queen.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: And the rarest that e'er came there.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Bate, I beseech you, widow Dido.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Oh, widow Dido? Ay, widow Dido.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Oh, widow Dido? Ay, widow Dido.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Is not, sir, my doublet as fresh as the first day I
wore it? I mean, in a sort.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Is not, sir, my doublet as fresh as the first day I
wore it? I mean, in a sort.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: That “sort” was well fished for.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: When I wore it at your daughter’s marriage?

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text:
You cram these words into mine ears against
The stomach of my sense. Would I had never
Married my daughter there! For, coming thence,
My son is lost and, in my rate, she too,
Who is so far from Italy removed
I ne'er again shall see her. O thou mine heir
Of Naples and of Milan, what strange fish
Hath made his meal on thee?

sentences.speaker: FRANCISCO
sentences.text:
Sir, he may live.
I saw him beat the surges under him,
And ride upon their backs. He trod the water,
Whose enmity he flung aside, and breasted
The surge most swoll'n that met him. His bold head
'Bove the contentious waves he kept, and oared
Himself with his good arms in lusty stroke
To th' shore, that o'er his wave-worn basis bowed,
As stooping to relieve him. I not doubt
He came alive to land.

sentences.speaker: FRANCISCO
sentences.text:
Sir, he may live.
I saw him beat the surges under him,
And ride upon their backs. He trod the water,
Whose enmity he flung aside, and breasted
The surge most swoll'n that met him. His bold head
'Bove the contentious waves he kept, and oared
Himself with his good arms in lusty stroke
To th' shore, that o'er his wave-worn basis bowed,
As stooping to relieve him. I not doubt
He came alive to land.

sentences.speaker: FRANCISCO
sentences.text:
Sir, he may live.
I saw him beat the surges under him,
And ride upon their backs. He trod the water,
Whose enmity he flung aside, and breasted

'Bove the contentious waves he kept, and oared
Himself with his good arms in lusty stroke
To th' shore, that o'er his wave-worn basis bowed,
As stooping to relieve him. I not doubt
He came alive to land.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: No, no, he’s gone.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Sir, you may thank yourself for this great loss,
That would not bless our Europe with your daughter,
But rather loose her to an African,
Where she at least is banished from your eye,
Who hath cause to wet the grief on ’t.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Sir, you may thank yourself for this great loss,
That would not bless our Europe with your daughter,
But rather loose her to an African,
Where she at least is banished from your eye,
Who hath cause to wet the grief on ’t.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: Prithee, peace.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
You were kneeled to and importuned otherwise
By all of us, and the fair soul herself
Weighed between loathness and obedience, at
Which end o' th' beam should bow. We have lost your
son,
I fear, forever. Milan and Naples have
More widows in them of this business' making
Than we bring men to comfort them.
The fault’s your own.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: So is the dearest o' th' loss.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
My lord Sebastian,
The truth you speak doth lack some gentleness
And time to speak it in. You rub the sore
When you should bring the plaster.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
My lord Sebastian,
The truth you speak doth lack some gentleness
And time to speak it in. You rub the sore
When you should bring the plaster.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Very well.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: And most chirurgeonly.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
[to ALONSO] It is foul weather in us all, good sir,
When you are cloudy.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Foul weather?

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Very foul.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: Had I plantation of this isle, my lord—

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: He’d sow ’t with nettle seed.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Or docks, or mallows.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: And were the king on ’t, what would I do?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: 'Scape being drunk for want of wine.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
I' th' commonwealth I would by contraries
Execute all things. For no kind of traffic
Would I admit. No name of magistrate.
Letters should not be known. Riches, poverty,
And use of service—none. Contract, succession,
Bourn, bound of land, tilth, vineyard—none.
No use of metal, corn, or wine, or oil.
No occupation. All men idle, all.
And women too, but innocent and pure.
No sovereignty—

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Yet he would be king on ’t.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
The latter end of his commonwealth forgets the
beginning.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
All things in common nature should produce
Without sweat or endeavor. Treason, felony,
Sword, pike, knife, gun, or need of any engine,
Would I not have. But nature should bring forth
Of its own kind all foison, all abundance,
To feed my innocent people.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: No marrying ’mong his subjects?

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: None, man. All idle. Whores and knaves.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: None, man. All idle. Whores and knaves.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: None, man. All idle. Whores and knaves.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
I would with such perfection govern, sir,
T' excel the Golden Age.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: 'Save his majesty!

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Long live Gonzalo!

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: [to ALONSO] And—do you mark me, sir?

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: Prithee, no more. Thou dost talk nothing to me.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: Prithee, no more. Thou dost talk nothing to me.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
I do well believe your highness, and did it to minister
occasion to these gentlemen, who are of such sensible
and nimble lungs that they always use to laugh at
nothing.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
I do well believe your highness, and did it to minister
occasion to these gentlemen, who are of such sensible
and nimble lungs that they always use to laugh at
nothing.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: 'Twas you we laughed at.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Who in this kind of merry fooling am nothing to you. So
you may continue and laugh at nothing still.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Who in this kind of merry fooling am nothing to you. So
you may continue and laugh at nothing still.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: What a blow was there given!

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: An it had not fallen flat-long.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
You are gentlemen of brave mettle. You would lift the
moon out of her sphere if she would continue in it five
weeks without changing.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
You are gentlemen of brave mettle. You would lift the
moon out of her sphere if she would continue in it five
weeks without changing.
ARIEL enters, invisible, playing solemn music.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: We would so, and then go a-batfowling.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: [to GONZALO] Nay, good my lord, be not angry.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
No, I warrant you. I will not adventure my discretion
so weakly. Will you laugh me asleep, for I am very
heavy?

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
No, I warrant you. I will not adventure my discretion
so weakly. Will you laugh me asleep, for I am very
heavy?

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Go sleep, and hear us.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Go sleep, and hear us.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Go sleep, and hear us.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text:
What, all so soon asleep? I wish mine eyes
Would with themselves shut up my thoughts. I find
They are inclined to do so.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text:

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Please you, sir,
Do not omit the heavy offer of it.
It seldom visits sorrow. When it doth,
It is a comforter.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:

Do not omit the heavy offer of it.
It seldom visits sorrow. When it doth,
It is a comforter.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
We two, my lord,
Will guard your person while you take your rest
And watch your safety.
Thank you. Wondrous heavy. [falls asleep]
Thank you. Wondrous heavy. [falls asleep]
ARIEL exits.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: What a strange drowsiness possesses them!

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: It is the quality o' th' climate.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Why
Doth it not then our eyelids sink? I find not
Myself disposed to sleep.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Why
Doth it not then our eyelids sink? I find not
Myself disposed to sleep.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Nor I. My spirits are nimble.
They fell together all, as by consent.
They dropped, as by a thunderstroke. What might,
Worthy Sebastian, O, what might—? No more.—
And yet methinks I see it in thy face,
What thou shouldst be. Th' occasion speaks thee, and
My strong imagination sees a crown
Dropping upon thy head.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: What, art thou waking?

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Do you not hear me speak?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
I do, and surely
It is a sleepy language, and thou speak’st
Out of thy sleep. What is it thou didst say?
This is a strange repose, to be asleep
With eyes wide open, standing, speaking, moving,
And yet so fast asleep.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
I do, and surely
It is a sleepy language, and thou speak’st
Out of thy sleep. What is it thou didst say?
This is a strange repose, to be asleep
With eyes wide open, standing, speaking, moving,
And yet so fast asleep.

This is a strange repose, to be asleep

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Noble Sebastian,
Thou let’st thy fortune sleep—die, rather—wink’st
Whiles thou art waking.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Thou dost snore distinctly.
There’s meaning in thy snores.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Thou dost snore distinctly.
There’s meaning in thy snores.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
I am more serious than my custom. You
Must be so too if heed me, which to do
Trebles thee o'er.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
I am more serious than my custom. You
Must be so too if heed me, which to do
Trebles thee o'er.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
I am more serious than my custom. You
Must be so too if heed me, which to do
Trebles thee o'er.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Well, I am standing water.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: I’ll teach you how to flow.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Do so. To ebb
Hereditary sloth instructs me.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Do so. To ebb
Hereditary sloth instructs me.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Oh,
If you but knew how you the purpose cherish
Whiles thus you mock it! How, in stripping it,
You more invest it! Ebbing men indeed
Most often do so near the bottom run
By their own fear or sloth.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Oh,
If you but knew how you the purpose cherish

Most often do so near the bottom run
By their own fear or sloth.

Oh,

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Prithee, say on.
The setting of thine eye and cheek proclaim
A matter from thee, and a birth indeed
Which throes thee much to yield.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Prithee, say on.
The setting of thine eye and cheek proclaim
A matter from thee, and a birth indeed
Which throes thee much to yield.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Thus, sir:
Although this lord of weak remembrance—this,
Who shall be of as little memory
When he is earthed— hath here almost persuade
(For he’s a spirit of persuasion only,
Professes to persuade) the king his son’s alive,
'Tis as impossible that he’s undrowned
And he that sleeps here swims.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Thus, sir:
Although this lord of weak remembrance—this,
Who shall be of as little memory
When he is earthed— hath here almost persuade
(For he’s a spirit of persuasion only,
Professes to persuade) the king his son’s alive,
'Tis as impossible that he’s undrowned
And he that sleeps here swims.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
I have no hope
That he’s undrowned.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Oh, out of that “no hope”
What great hope have you! No hope that way is
Another way so high a hope that even
Ambition cannot pierce a wink beyond,
But doubt discovery there. Will you grant with me
That Ferdinand is drowned?

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:

Ambition cannot pierce a wink beyond,
But doubt discovery there. Will you grant with me
That Ferdinand is drowned?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: He’s gone.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Then, tell me,
Who’s the next heir of Naples?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Claribel.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
She that is Queen of Tunis; she that dwells
Ten leagues beyond man’s life; she that from Naples
Can have no note, unless the sun were post—
The man i' th' moon’s too slow— till newborn chins
Be rough and razorable; she that from whom
We all were sea-swallowed, though some cast again,
And by that destiny to perform an act
Whereof what’s past is prologue, what to come
In yours and my discharge.

Be rough and razorable; she that from whom
We all were sea-swallowed, though some cast again,
And by that destiny to perform an act
Whereof what’s past is prologue, what to come
In yours and my discharge.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
She that is Queen of Tunis; she that dwells
Ten leagues beyond man’s life; she that from Naples
Can have no note, unless the sun were post—
The man i' th' moon’s too slow— till newborn chins
Be rough and razorable; she that from whom
We all were sea-swallowed, though some cast again,
And by that destiny to perform an act
Whereof what’s past is prologue, what to come
In yours and my discharge.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
What stuff is this? How say you?
'Tis true, my brother’s daughter’s Queen of Tunis,
So is she heir of Naples, ’twixt which regions
There is some space.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:

'Tis true, my brother’s daughter’s Queen of Tunis,
So is she heir of Naples, ’twixt which regions
There is some space.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN

What stuff is this? How say you?

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
A space whose every cubit
Seems to cry out, “How shall that Claribel
Measure us back to Naples? Keep in Tunis,
And let Sebastian wake.” Say this were death
That now hath seized them. Why, they were no worse
Than now they are. There be that can rule Naples
As well as he that sleeps, lords that can prate
As amply and unnecessarily
As this Gonzalo. I myself could make
A chough of as deep chat. Oh, that you bore
The mind that I do, what a sleep were this
For your advancement! Do you understand me?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: Methinks I do.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
And how does your content
Tender your own good fortune?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
I remember
You did supplant your brother Prospero.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
True.
And look how well my garments sit upon me,
Much feater than before. My brother’s servants
Were then my fellows. Now they are my men.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
True.
And look how well my garments sit upon me,
Much feater than before. My brother’s servants
Were then my fellows. Now they are my men.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
True.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text: But, for your conscience?

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Ay, sir. Where lies that? If ’twere a kibe,
'Twould put me to my slipper. But I feel not
This deity in my bosom. Twenty consciences,
That stand ’twixt me and Milan, candied be they
And melt ere they molest! Here lies your brother,
No better than the earth he lies upon,
If he were that which now he’s like, that’s dead;
Whom I, with this obedient steel, three inches of it,
Can lay to bed for ever; whiles you, doing thus,
To the perpetual wink for aye might put
This ancient morsel, this Sir Prudence, who
Should not upbraid our course. For all the rest,
They’ll take suggestion as a cat laps milk.
They’ll tell the clock to any business that
We say befits the hour.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Thy case, dear friend,
Shall be my precedent. As thou got’st Milan,
I’ll come by Naples. Draw thy sword. One stroke
Shall free thee from the tribute which thou payest.
And I the king shall love thee.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Draw together.
And when I rear my hand, do you the like,
To fall it on Gonzalo.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
O, but one word.
[speaks quietly to ANTONIO]
ARIEL enters, invisible, playing music and singing.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text:
[to GONZALO] My master through his art foresees the
danger
That you, his friend, are, and sends me forth—
For else his project dies—to keep them living.
[sings in GONZALO’s ear]
While you here do snoring lie,
Open-eyed conspiracy
His time doth take.
If of life you keep a care,
Shake off slumber and beware.
Awake! Awake!

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: Then let us both be sudden.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
[waking and seeing them]
Now, good angels preserve the king!

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: [waking] Why, how now? Ho, awake!

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text: What’s the matter?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
Whiles we stood here securing your repose,
Even now, we heard a hollow burst of bellowing
Like bulls, or rather lions. Did ’t not wake you?
It struck mine ear most terribly.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: I heard nothing.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
Oh, ’twas a din to fright a monster’s ear,
To make an earthquake! Sure, it was the roar
Of a whole herd of lions.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO

To make an earthquake! Sure, it was the roar

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: Heard you this, Gonzalo?

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Upon mine honor, sir, I heard a humming,
And that a strange one too, which did awake me.
I shaked you, sir, and cried. As mine eyes opened,
I saw their weapons drawn. There was a noise,
That’s verily. 'Tis best we stand upon our guard,
Or that we quit this place. Let’s draw our weapons.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text:
Lead off this ground, and let’s make further search
For my poor son.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Heavens keep him from these beasts!
For he is, sure, i' th' island.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Heavens keep him from these beasts!
For he is, sure, i' th' island.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: Lead away.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text:
[aside] Prospero my lord shall know what I have done.
So, King, go safely on to seek thy son.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text:
[aside] Prospero my lord shall know what I have done.
So, King, go safely on to seek thy son.
They exit.
CALIBAN enters, carrying a load of wood. There is a sound of thunder.
CALIBAN enters, carrying a load of wood. There is a sound of thunder.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
All the infections that the sun sucks up
From bogs, fens, flats, on Prosper fall and make him
By inchmeal a disease! His spirits hear me
And yet I needs must curse. But they’ll nor pinch,
Fright me with urchin-shows, pitch me i' th' mire,
Nor lead me like a firebrand in the dark
Out of my way, unless he bid 'em. But
For every trifle are they set upon me,
Sometime like apes that mow and chatter at me,
And after bite me, then like hedgehogs which
Lie tumbling in my barefoot way and mount
Their pricks at my footfall. Sometime am I
All wound with adders who with cloven tongues
Do hiss me into madness.

All wound with adders who with cloven tongues
Do hiss me into madness.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
All the infections that the sun sucks up
From bogs, fens, flats, on Prosper fall and make him
By inchmeal a disease! His spirits hear me
And yet I needs must curse. But they’ll nor pinch,
Fright me with urchin-shows, pitch me i' th' mire,
Nor lead me like a firebrand in the dark
Out of my way, unless he bid 'em. But
For every trifle are they set upon me,
Sometime like apes that mow and chatter at me,
And after bite me, then like hedgehogs which
Lie tumbling in my barefoot way and mount
Their pricks at my footfall. Sometime am I
All wound with adders who with cloven tongues
Do hiss me into madness.

For every trifle are they set upon me,
Sometime like apes that mow and chatter at me,
And after bite me, then like hedgehogs which
Lie tumbling in my barefoot way and mount
Their pricks at my footfall. Sometime am I
All wound with adders who with cloven tongues
Do hiss me into madness.
TRINCULO enters.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Lo, now, lo!
Here comes a spirit of his, and to torment me
For bringing wood in slowly. I’ll fall flat.
Perchance he will not mind me. [lies down, covered by
his gaberdine]

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
Here’s neither bush nor shrub to bear off any weather
at all. And another storm brewing, I hear it sing i' th'
wind. Yond same black cloud, yond huge one, looks like
a foul bombard that would shed his liquor. If it should
thunder as it did before, I know not where to hide my
head. Yond same cloud cannot choose but fall by
pailfuls. [sees CALIBAN] What have we here? A man or a
fish? Dead or alive? A fish. He smells like a fish, a
very ancient and fish-like smell, a kind of
not-of-the-newest poor-john. A strange fish! Were I in
England now, as once I was, and had but this fish
painted, not a holiday fool there but would give a piece
of silver. There would this monster make a man. Any
strange beast there makes a man. When they will not give
a doit to relieve a lame beggar, they will lay out ten
to see a dead Indian. Legged like a man and his fins
like arms! Warm, o' my troth. I do now let loose my
opinion, hold it no longer: this is no fish, but an
islander that hath lately suffered by a thunderbolt.

Thunder.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
Alas,
the storm is come again! My best way is to creep under
his gaberdine. T here is no other shelter hereabouts.
Misery acquaints a man with strange bedfellows. I will
here shroud till the dregs of the storm be past. [crawls
under gaberdine]

STEPHANO enters, singing.

[sings]
I shall no more to sea, to sea,
Here shall I die ashore—
This is a very scurvy tune to sing at a man’s funeral.
Well, here’s my comfort. [drinks, sings]
The master, the swabber, the boatswain, and I,
The gunner and his mate
Loved Mall, Meg, and Marian, and Margery,
But none of us cared for Kate.
For she had a tongue with a tang,
Would cry to a sailor, “Go hang!”
She loved not the savor of tar nor of pitch,
Yet a tailor might scratch her where'ershe did itch.
Then to sea, boys, and let her go hang!
This is a scurvy tune too. But here’s my comfort.
[drinks]

[sings]

Well, here’s my comfort. [drinks, sings]
The master, the swabber, the boatswain, and I,
The gunner and his mate
Loved Mall, Meg, and Marian, and Margery,
But none of us cared for Kate.
For she had a tongue with a tang,
Would cry to a sailor, “Go hang!”
She loved not the savor of tar nor of pitch,
Yet a tailor might scratch her where'ershe did itch.
Then to sea, boys, and let her go hang!
This is a scurvy tune too. But here’s my comfort.
[drinks]

[sings]
I shall no more to sea, to sea,
Here shall I die ashore—
This is a very scurvy tune to sing at a man’s funeral.
Well, here’s my comfort. [drinks, sings]
The master, the swabber, the boatswain, and I,
The gunner and his mate
Loved Mall, Meg, and Marian, and Margery,
But none of us cared for Kate.
For she had a tongue with a tang,
Would cry to a sailor, “Go hang!”
She loved not the savor of tar nor of pitch,
Yet a tailor might scratch her where'ershe did itch.
Then to sea, boys, and let her go hang!
This is a scurvy tune too. But here’s my comfort.
[drinks]

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text: Do not torment me. Oh!

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
What’s the matter? Have we devils here? Do you put
tricks upon ’s with savages and men of Ind, ha? I have
not ’scaped drowning to be afeard now of your four legs.
Or it hath been said, “As proper a man as ever went on
four legs cannot make him give ground,” and it shall be
said so again while Stephano breathes at' nostrils.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text: The spirit torments me. Oh!

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
This is some monster of the isle with four legs who
hath got, as I take it, an ague. Where the devil should
he learn our language? I will give him some relief if it
be but for that. If I can recover him and keep him tame
and get to Naples with him, he’s a present for any
emperor that ever trod on neat’s leather.

Do not torment me, prithee. I’ll bring my wood home
faster.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
He’s in his fit now and does not talk after the wisest.
He shall taste of my bottle. If he have never drunk
wine afore, it will go near to remove his fit. If I can
recover him and keep him tame, I will not take too much
for him. He shall pay for him that hath him, and that
soundly.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
[trying to give CALIBAN drink]
Come on your ways. Open your mouth. Here is that which
will give language to you, cat. Open your mouth. This
will shake your shaking, I can tell you, and that
soundly. You cannot tell who’s your friend. Open your
chaps again.

drowned, and these are devils. Oh, defend me!

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Four legs and two voices—a most delicate monster.His
forward voice now is to speak well of his friend. His
backward voice is to utter foul speeches and to detract.
If all the wine in my bottle will recover him, I will
help his ague. Come. [CALIBAN drinks] Amen! I will pour
some in thy other mouth.

devil, and no monster. I will leave him. I have no long
spoon.

Stephano! If thou beest Stephano, touch me and speak to
me. For I am Trinculo—be not afeard—thy good friend
Trinculo.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
If thou beest Trinculo, come forth. I’ll pull thee by
the lesser legs. If any be Trinculo’s legs, these are
they. [pulls TRINCULO out from under the gaberdine] Thou
art very Trinculo indeed! How camest thou to be the
siege of this mooncalf? Can he vent Trinculos?

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
I took him to be killed with a thunderstroke. But art
thou not drowned, Stephano? I hope now thou art not
drowned. Is the storm overblown? I hid me under the dead
mooncalf’s gaberdine for fear of the storm. And art
thou living, Stephano? O Stephano, two Neapolitans
’scaped! [dances STEPHANO about]

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[aside] These be fine things, an if they be not
sprites. That’s a brave god and bears celestial liquor.
I will kneel to him.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
[to TRINCULO] How didst thou ’scape? How camest thou
hither? Swear by this bottle how thou camest hither. I
escaped upon a butt of sack which the sailors heaved
o'erboard, by this bottle, which I made of the bark of a
tree with mine own hands since I was cast ashore.

[To STEPHANO] I’ll swear upon that bottle to be thy
true subject, for the liquor is not earthly.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: [to TRINCULO] Here. Swear then how thou escapedst.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
Swum ashore, man, like a duck. I can swim like a duck,
I’ll be sworn.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO

Here, kiss the book. Though thou canst swim like a
duck, thou art made like a goose.

The whole butt, man. My cellar is in a rock by th'
seaside where my wine is hid.—How now, mooncalf? How
does thine ague?

Out o' th' moon, I do assure thee. I was the man i’ the
moon when time was.

I have seen thee in her and I do adore thee. My
mistress showed me thee and thy dog and thy bush.

By this good light, this is a very shallow monster. I
afeard of him! A very weak monster. The man i' th' moon!
A most poor credulous monster.— Well drawn, monster, in
good sooth!

And I will kiss thy foot. I prithee, be my god.

monster!

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
I’ll show thee the best springs. I’ll pluck thee
berries.
I’ll fish for thee and get thee wood enough.
A plague upon the tyrant that I serve!
I’ll bear him no more sticks, but follow thee,
Thou wondrous man.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
A most ridiculous monster, to make a wonder of a poor
drunkard.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[to STEPHANO] I prithee, let me bring thee where crabs
grow.
And I with my long nails will dig thee pignuts,
Show thee a jay’s nest, and instruct thee how
To snare the nimble marmoset. I’ll bring thee
To clustering filberts, and sometimes I’ll get thee
Young scamels from the rock. Wilt thou go with me?

I prithee now, lead the way without any more talking.
Trinculo, the king and all our company else being
drowned, we will inherit here. Here, bear my bottle.
Fellow Trinculo, we’ll fill him by and by again.

[sings drunkenly]
Farewell, master! Farewell, farewell.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text: A howling monster, a drunken monster.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[sings]
No more dams I’ll make for fish,
Nor fetch in firing
At requiring,
Nor scrape trencher, nor wash dish.
'Ban, 'Ban, Ca-Caliban
Has a new master. Get a new man.
Freedom, high-day! High-day, freedom! Freedom,
high-day, freedom!

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: O brave monster! Lead the way.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: O brave monster! Lead the way.
They exit.
FERDINAND enters, carrying a log.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
There be some sports are painful, and their labor
Delight in them sets off. Some kinds of baseness
Are nobly undergone. And most poor matters
Point to rich ends. This my mean task
Would be as heavy to me as odious, but
The mistress which I serve quickens what’s dead
And makes my labors pleasures. Oh, she is
Ten times more gentle than her father’s crabbed,
And he’s composed of harshness. I must remove
Some thousands of these logs and pile them up,
Upon a sore injunction. My sweet mistress
Weeps when she sees me work, and says such baseness
Had never like executor. I forget,
But these sweet thoughts do even refresh my labors,
Most busiest when I do it.

MIRANDA enters, followed by PROSPERO who remains unseen by the others.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
Alas now, pray you,
Work not so hard. I would the lightning had
Burnt up those logs that you are enjoined to pile!
Pray, set it down and rest you. When this burns,
'Twill weep for having wearied you. My father
Is hard at study. Pray now, rest yourself.
He’s safe for these three hours.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
O most dear mistress,
The sun will set before I shall discharge
What I must strive to do.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
If you’ll sit down,
I’ll bear your logs the while. Pray, give me that.
I’ll carry it to the pile.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
If you’ll sit down,
I’ll bear your logs the while. Pray, give me that.
I’ll carry it to the pile.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:

I’ll bear your logs the while. Pray, give me that.
I’ll carry it to the pile.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
No, precious creature.
I had rather crack my sinews, break my back,
Than you should such dishonor undergo
While I sit lazy by.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
It would become me
As well as it does you, and I should do it
With much more ease, for my good will is to it
And yours it is against.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
[aside] Poor worm, thou art infected!
This visitation shows it.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
[aside] Poor worm, thou art infected!
This visitation shows it.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text: You look wearily.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
No, noble mistress. 'Tis fresh morning with me
When you are by at night. I do beseech you—
Chiefly that I might set it in my prayers—
What is your name?

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
Miranda. O my father,
I have broke your hest to say so!

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
Miranda. O my father,
I have broke your hest to say so!

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
Admired Miranda!
Indeed the top of admiration, worth
What’s dearest to th' world! Full many a lady
I have eyed with best regard and many a time
Th' harmony of their tongues hath into bondage
Brought my too diligent ear. For several virtues
Have I liked several women. Never any
With so full soul but some defect in her
Did quarrel with the noblest grace she owed
And put it to the foil. But you, O you,
So perfect and so peerless, are created
Of every creature’s best.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
I do not know
One of my sex, no woman’s face remember—
Save, from my glass, mine own. Nor have I seen
More that I may call men than you, good friend,
And my dear father. How features are abroad
I am skill-less of, but, by my modesty,
The jewel in my dower, I would not wish
Any companion in the world but you,
Nor can imagination form a shape
Besides yourself to like of. But I prattle
Something too wildly, and my father’s precepts
I therein do forget.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
I am in my condition
A prince, Miranda—I do think, a king;
I would, not so!—and would no more endure
This wooden slavery than to suffer
The flesh-fly blow my mouth. Hear my soul speak.
The very instant that I saw you did
My heart fly to your service, there resides
To make me slave to it, and for your sake
Am I this patient log-man.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text: Do you love me?

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
O heaven, O earth, bear witness to this sound
And crown what I profess with kind event
If I speak true! If hollowly, invert
What best is boded me to mischief! I
Beyond all limit of what else i' th' world
Do love, prize, honor you.

O heaven, O earth, bear witness to this sound
And crown what I profess with kind event
If I speak true! If hollowly, invert
What best is boded me to mischief! I
Beyond all limit of what else i' th' world
Do love, prize, honor you.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
I am a fool
To weep at what I am glad of.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
[aside] Fair encounter
Of two most rare affections! Heavens rain grace
On that which breeds between 'em!

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
[aside] Fair encounter
Of two most rare affections! Heavens rain grace
On that which breeds between 'em!

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text: Wherefore weep you?

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
At mine unworthiness, that dare not offer
What I desire to give, and much less take
What I shall die to want. But this is trifling,
And all the more it seeks to hide itself
The bigger bulk it shows. Hence, bashful cunning,
And prompt me, plain and holy innocence!
I am your wife if you will marry me.
If not, I’ll die your maid. To be your fellow
You may deny me, but I’ll be your servant
Whether you will or no.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text: My mistress, dearest, and I thus humble ever.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text: My mistress, dearest, and I thus humble ever.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text: My husband, then?

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
Ay, with a heart as willing
As bondage e'er of freedom. Here’s my hand.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
Ay, with a heart as willing
As bondage e'er of freedom. Here’s my hand.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
And mine, with my heart in ’t. And now farewell
Till half an hour hence.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
And mine, with my heart in ’t. And now farewell
Till half an hour hence.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text: A thousand thousand!
MIRANDA and FERDINAND exit, in opposite directions.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
So glad of this as they I cannot be,
Who are surprised withal. But my rejoicing
At nothing can be more. I’ll to my book,
For yet ere supper-time must I perform
Much business appertaining.

CALIBAN, STEPHANO, and TRINCULO enter.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Tell not me. When the butt is out, we will drink water.
Not a drop before. Therefore bear up and board
'em.—Servant- monster, drink to me.

sentences.text:

Tell not me. When the butt is out, we will drink water.

'em.—Servant- monster, drink to me.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
“Servant-monster?” The folly of this island. They say
there’s but five upon this isle. We are three of them.
If th' other two be brained like us, the state totters.

sentences.text:

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Drink, servant-monster, when I bid thee. Thy eyes are
almost set in thy head.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Drink, servant-monster, when I bid thee. Thy eyes are
almost set in thy head.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
Where should they be set else? He were a brave monster
indeed, if they were set in his tail.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
Where should they be set else? He were a brave monster
indeed, if they were set in his tail.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
My man-monster hath drowned his tongue in sack. For my
part, the sea cannot drown me. I swam, ere I could
recover the shore, five and thirty leagues off and on.
By this light, thou shalt be my lieutenant, monster, or
my standard.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text: Your lieutenant, if you list. He’s no standard.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text: Your lieutenant, if you list. He’s no standard.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: We’ll not run, Monsieur Monster.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
Nor go neither. But you’ll lie like dogs, and yet say
nothing neither.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
Nor go neither. But you’ll lie like dogs, and yet say
nothing neither.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Mooncalf, speak once in thy life, if thou beest a good
mooncalf.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
How does thy honor? Let me lick thy shoe.
[indicates TRINCULO] I’ll not serve him. He’s not
valiant.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
How does thy honor? Let me lick thy shoe.
[indicates TRINCULO] I’ll not serve him. He’s not
valiant.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
How does thy honor? Let me lick thy shoe.
[indicates TRINCULO] I’ll not serve him. He’s not
valiant.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
[to CALIBAN] Thou liest, most ignorant monster. I am in
case to justle a constable. Why, thou deboshed fish,
thou, was there ever man a coward that hath drunk so
much sack as I today? Wilt thou tell a monstrous lie,
being but half a fish and half a monster?

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[to STEPHANO]
Lo, how he mocks me! Wilt thou let him, my lord?

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[to STEPHANO]
Lo, how he mocks me! Wilt thou let him, my lord?

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
“Lord,” quoth he? That a monster should be such a
natural!

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
“Lord,” quoth he? That a monster should be such a
natural!

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[to STEPHANO]
Lo, lo, again! Bite him to death, I prithee.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[to STEPHANO]
Lo, lo, again! Bite him to death, I prithee.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Trinculo, keep a good tongue in your head. If you prove
a mutineer, the next tree. The poor monster’s my
subject and he shall not suffer indignity.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Trinculo, keep a good tongue in your head. If you prove
a mutineer, the next tree. The poor monster’s my
subject and he shall not suffer indignity.

subject and he shall not suffer indignity.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
I thank my noble lord. Wilt thou be pleased to hearken
once again to the suit I made to thee?

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
I thank my noble lord. Wilt thou be pleased to hearken
once again to the suit I made to thee?

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Marry, will I. Kneel and repeat it. I will stand, and
so shall
Trinculo.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Marry, will I. Kneel and repeat it. I will stand, and
so shall
Trinculo.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Marry, will I. Kneel and repeat it. I will stand, and
so shall
Trinculo.
ARIEL enters, invisible.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[kneeling] As I told thee before, I am subject to a
tyrant, a sorcerer that by his cunning hath cheated me
of the island.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: Thou liest.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[to TRINCULO] Thou liest, thou jesting monkey, thou! I
would my valiant master would destroy thee. I do not
lie.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[to TRINCULO] Thou liest, thou jesting monkey, thou! I
would my valiant master would destroy thee. I do not
lie.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
[to TRINCULO] Thou liest, thou jesting monkey, thou! I
would my valiant master would destroy thee. I do not
lie.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Trinculo, if you trouble him any more in ’s tale, by
this hand, I will supplant some of your teeth.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text: Why, I said nothing.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: Mum, then, and no more. Proceed.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: Mum, then, and no more. Proceed.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
I say, by sorcery he got this isle.
From me he got it. If thy greatness will
Revenge it on him—for I know thou darest,
But this thing dare not—

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
I say, by sorcery he got this isle.
From me he got it. If thy greatness will
Revenge it on him—for I know thou darest,
But this thing dare not—

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
I say, by sorcery he got this isle.
From me he got it. If thy greatness will
Revenge it on him—for I know thou darest,
But this thing dare not—

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: That’s most certain.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text: Thou shalt be lord of it and I’ll serve thee.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
How now shall this be compassed?
Canst thou bring me to th' party?

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
How now shall this be compassed?
Canst thou bring me to th' party?

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Yea, yea, my lord. I’ll yield him thee asleep,
Where thou mayst knock a nail into his head.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Yea, yea, my lord. I’ll yield him thee asleep,
Where thou mayst knock a nail into his head.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: Thou liest. Thou canst not.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: Thou liest. Thou canst not.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
What a pied ninny’s this! Thou scurvy patch!
I do beseech thy greatness, give him blows
And take his bottle from him. When that’s gone,
He shall drink naught but brine, for I’ll not show him
Where the quick freshes are.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Trinculo, run into no further danger. Interrupt the
monster one word further, and, by this hand, I’ll turn
my mercy out o' doors and make a stockfish of thee.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Trinculo, run into no further danger. Interrupt the
monster one word further, and, by this hand, I’ll turn
my mercy out o' doors and make a stockfish of thee.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text: Why, what did I? I did nothing. I’ll go farther off.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text: Why, what did I? I did nothing. I’ll go farther off.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text: Why, what did I? I did nothing. I’ll go farther off.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: Didst thou not say he lied?

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: Thou liest.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
[to TRINCULO] Do I so? Take thou that.
[beatsTRINCULO]
As you like this, give me the lie another time.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
[to TRINCULO] Do I so? Take thou that.
[beatsTRINCULO]
As you like this, give me the lie another time.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
I did not give the lie. Out o' your wits and hearing
too? A pox o' your bottle! This can sack and drinking
do. A murrain on your monster, and the devil take your
fingers!

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
I did not give the lie. Out o' your wits and hearing
too? A pox o' your bottle! This can sack and drinking
do. A murrain on your monster, and the devil take your
fingers!

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text: Ha, ha, ha!

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Now, forward with your tale.—Prithee, stand farther
off.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Now, forward with your tale.—Prithee, stand farther
off.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Beat him enough. After a little time,
I’ll beat him too.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Beat him enough. After a little time,
I’ll beat him too.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: Stand farther.—Come, proceed.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Why, as I told thee, ’tis a custom with him,
I' th' afternoon to sleep. There thou mayst brain him,
Having first seized his books; or with a log
Batter his skull; or paunch him with a stake;
Or cut his weasand with thy knife. Remember
First to possess his books, for without them
He’s but a sot, as I am, nor hath not
One spirit to command. They all do hate him
As rootedly as I. Burn but his books.
He has brave utensils—for so he calls them—
Which when he has a house, he’ll deck withal.
And that most deeply to consider is
The beauty of his daughter. He himself
Calls her a nonpareil. I never saw a woman,
But only Sycorax my dam and she.
But she as far surpasseth Sycorax
As great’st does least.

Which when he has a house, he’ll deck withal.
And that most deeply to consider is
The beauty of his daughter. He himself
Calls her a nonpareil. I never saw a woman,
But only Sycorax my dam and she.
But she as far surpasseth Sycorax
As great’st does least.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Why, as I told thee, ’tis a custom with him,
I' th' afternoon to sleep. There thou mayst brain him,
Having first seized his books; or with a log
Batter his skull; or paunch him with a stake;
Or cut his weasand with thy knife. Remember
First to possess his books, for without them
He’s but a sot, as I am, nor hath not
One spirit to command. They all do hate him
As rootedly as I. Burn but his books.
He has brave utensils—for so he calls them—
Which when he has a house, he’ll deck withal.
And that most deeply to consider is
The beauty of his daughter. He himself
Calls her a nonpareil. I never saw a woman,
But only Sycorax my dam and she.
But she as far surpasseth Sycorax
As great’st does least.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Ay, lord. She will become thy bed, I warrant.
And bring thee forth brave brood.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Ay, lord. She will become thy bed, I warrant.
And bring thee forth brave brood.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Monster, I will kill this man. His daughter and I will
be king and queen—save our graces!—and Trinculo and
thyself shall be viceroys. Dost thou like the plot,
Trinculo?

Give me thy hand. I am sorry I beat thee. But while
thou livest, keep a good tongue in thy head.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN

Within this half hour will he be asleep. Wilt thou
destroy him then?

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Within this half hour will he be asleep. Wilt thou
destroy him then?

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: Ay, on mine honor.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: [aside] This will I tell my master.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Thou makest me merry. I am full of pleasure.
Let us be jocund. Will you troll the catch
You taught me but whilere?

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO

At thy request, monster, I will do reason, any reason.
Come on, Trinculo, let us sing.
[sings]
Flout 'em and scout 'em,
And scout 'em and flout 'em.
Thought is free.

sentences.text: That’s not the tune.
ARIEL plays the tune on a small drum and a flute.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: What is this same?

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
This is the tune of our catch, played by the picture of
Nobody.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
If thou beest a man, show thyself in thy likeness. If
thou beest a devil, take ’t as thou list.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text: O, forgive me my sins!

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
He that dies pays all debts.—I defy thee!—Mercy upon
us!

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text: Art thou afeard?

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text: No, monster, not I.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Be not afeard. The isle is full of noises,
Sounds, and sweet airs that give delight and hurt not.
Sometimes a thousand twangling instruments
Will hum about mine ears, and sometime voices
That, if I then had waked after long sleep,
Will make me sleep again. And then, in dreaming,
The clouds methought would open and show riches
Ready to drop upon me, that when I waked
I cried to dream again.

This will prove a brave kingdom to me, where I shall
have my music for nothing.

They all exit.
ALONSO, SEBASTIAN, ANTONIO, GONZALO, ADRIAN, FRANCISCO, and others enter.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
[to ALONSO] By 'r lakin, I can go no further, sir.
My old bones ache. Here’s a maze trod indeed
Through forthrights and meanders. By your patience,
I needs must rest me.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
[to ALONSO] By 'r lakin, I can go no further, sir.
My old bones ache. Here’s a maze trod indeed
Through forthrights and meanders. By your patience,
I needs must rest me.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text:
Old lord, I cannot blame thee,
Who am myself attached with weariness
To th' dulling of my spirits. Sit down and rest.
Even here I will put off my hope and keep it
No longer for my flatterer. He is drowned
Whom thus we stray to find, and the sea mocks
Our frustrate search on land. Well, let him go.

sentences.text:
[aside to SEBASTIAN] I am right glad that he’s so out
of hope.
Do not, for one repulse, forego the purpose
That you resolved t' effect.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
[aside to ANTONIO] The next advantage
Will we take throughly.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
[aside to SEBASTIAN] Let it be tonight,
For now they are oppressed with travel. They
Will not, nor cannot, use such vigilance
As when they are fresh.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO

Solemn and strange music plays.
PROSPERO enters above the stage, invisible.

sentences.text: What harmony is this? My good friends, hark!

sentences.speaker: ALONSO

sentences.speaker: GONZALO

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: Give us kind keepers, heavens! What were these?

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: Give us kind keepers, heavens! What were these?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
A living drollery. Now I will believe
That there are unicorns, that in Arabia
There is one tree, the phoenix' throne, one phoenix
At this hour reigning there.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
A living drollery. Now I will believe
That there are unicorns, that in Arabia
There is one tree, the phoenix' throne, one phoenix
At this hour reigning there.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text:
I’ll believe both
And what does else want credit, come to me,
And I’ll be sworn ’tis true. Travelers ne'er did lie,
Though fools at home condemn 'em.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
If in Naples
I should report this now, would they believe me?
If I should say, I saw such islanders—
For, certes, these are people of the island—
Who, though they are of monstrous shape, yet note,
Their manners are more gentle-kind than of
Our human generation you shall find
Many—nay, almost any.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
[aside] Honest lord,
Thou hast said well, for some of you there present
Are worse than devils.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text:
I cannot too much muse
Such shapes, such gesture, and such sound, expressing,
Although they want the use of tongue, a kind
Of excellent dumb discourse.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text: [aside] Praise in departing.

sentences.speaker: FRANCISCO
sentences.text: They vanished strangely.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
No matter, since
They have left their viands behind, for we have
stomachs.
Will ’t please you taste of what is here?

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
No matter, since
They have left their viands behind, for we have
stomachs.
Will ’t please you taste of what is here?

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text: Not I.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
Faith, sir, you need not fear. When we were boys,
Who would believe that there were mountaineers
Dewlapped like bulls, whose throats had hanging at 'em
Wallets of flesh, or that there were such men
Whose heads stood in their breasts?—which now we find
Each putter-out of five for one will bring us
Good warrant of.

sentences.speaker: ALONSO

I will stand to and feed,
Although my last. No matter, since I feel
The best is past. Brother, my lord the duke,
Stand to and do as we.

ARIEL enters in the form of a harpy. ARIEL flaps his wings on the table, and by means of some kind of device on stage, the food disappears from the table.
ARIEL enters in the form of a harpy. ARIEL flaps his wings on the table, and by means of some kind of device on stage, the food disappears from the table.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text:
[to ALONSO, ANTONIO, and SEBASTIAN]
You are three men of sin, whom Destiny,
That hath to instrument this lower world
And what is in ’t, the never-surfeited sea
Hath caused to belch up you— and on this island
Where man doth not inhabit, you ’mongst men
Being most unfit to live. I have made you mad,
And even with suchlike valor men hang and drown
Their proper selves.
[ALONSO, SEBASTIAN, and ANTONIO draw their swords]
You fools, I and my fellows
Are ministers of fate. The elements
Of whom your swords are tempered may as well
Wound the loud winds or with bemocked-at stabs
Kill the still-closing waters as diminish
One dowl that’s in my plume. My fellow ministers
Are like invulnerable. If you could hurt,
Your swords are now too massy for your strengths
And will not be uplifted. But remember—
For that’s my business to you—that you three
From Milan did supplant good Prospero,
Exposed unto the sea, which hath requit it,
Him and his innocent child. For which foul deed
The powers—delaying, not forgetting—have
Incensed the seas and shores, yea, all the creatures,

They have bereft, and do pronounce by me
Lingering perdition, worse than any death
Can be at once, shall step by step attend

Which here, in this most desolate isle, else falls
Upon your heads—is nothing but hearts' sorrow
And a clear life ensuing.

[to ALONSO, ANTONIO, and SEBASTIAN]
You are three men of sin, whom Destiny,
That hath to instrument this lower world
And what is in ’t, the never-surfeited sea
Hath caused to belch up you— and on this island
Where man doth not inhabit, you ’mongst men
Being most unfit to live. I have made you mad,
And even with suchlike valor men hang and drown
Their proper selves.
[ALONSO, SEBASTIAN, and ANTONIO draw their swords]
You fools, I and my fellows
Are ministers of fate. The elements
Of whom your swords are tempered may as well
Wound the loud winds or with bemocked-at stabs
Kill the still-closing waters as diminish
One dowl that’s in my plume. My fellow ministers
Are like invulnerable. If you could hurt,
Your swords are now too massy for your strengths

As quiet music plays, the shapes enter again and dance, making mocking gestures and nasty faces, they carry out the banquet table.
As quiet music plays, the shapes enter again and dance, making mocking gestures and nasty faces, they carry out the banquet table.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
[aside] Bravely the figure of this harpy hast thou
Performed, my Ariel. A grace it had, devouring.
Of my instruction hast thou nothing bated
In what thou hadst to say. So with good life
And observation strange, my meaner ministers
Their several kinds have done. My high charms work
And these mine enemies are all knit up
In their distractions. They now are in my power,
And in these fits I leave them while I visit
Young Ferdinand, whom they suppose is drowned,
And his and mine loved darling.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
[to ALONSO] I' th' name of something holy, sir, why
stand you
In this strange stare?

sentences.speaker: ALONSO
sentences.text:
Oh, it is monstrous, monstrous.
Methought the billows spoke and told me of it,
The winds did sing it to me, and the thunder,
That deep and dreadful organ pipe, pronounced
The name of Prosper. It did bass my trespass.
Therefore my son i' th' ooze is bedded, and
I’ll seek him deeper than e'er plummet sounded
And with him there lie mudded.

sentences.speaker: SEBASTIAN
sentences.text:
But one fiend at a time,
I’ll fight their legions o'er.

sentences.speaker: ANTONIO
sentences.text: I’ll be thy second.
SEBASTIAN and ANTONIO exit.

sentences.speaker: GONZALO
sentences.text:
All three of them are desperate. Their great guilt,
Like poison given to work a great time after,
Now 'gins to bite the spirits. I do beseech you
That are of suppler joints, follow them swiftly
And hinder them from what this ecstasy
May now provoke them to.

sentences.speaker: ADRIAN
sentences.text: Follow, I pray you.
They all exit.
PROSPERO, FERDINAND, and MIRANDA enter.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
[to FERDINAND] If I have too austerely punished you,
Your compensation makes amends, for I
Have given you here a third of mine own life—
Or that for which I live— who once again
I tender to thy hand. All thy vexations
Were but my trials of thy love and thou
Hast strangely stood the test. Here, afore heaven,
I ratify this my rich gift. O Ferdinand,
Do not smile at me that I boast of her,
For thou shalt find she will outstrip all praise
And make it halt behind her.

sentences.text:
[to FERDINAND] If I have too austerely punished you,
Your compensation makes amends, for I
Have given you here a third of mine own life—
Or that for which I live— who once again
I tender to thy hand. All thy vexations
Were but my trials of thy love and thou
Hast strangely stood the test. Here, afore heaven,
I ratify this my rich gift. O Ferdinand,
Do not smile at me that I boast of her,
For thou shalt find she will outstrip all praise
And make it halt behind her.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
I do believe it
Against an oracle.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
Then as my gift and thine own acquisition
Worthily purchased, take my daughter. But
If thou dost break her virgin knot before
All sanctimonious ceremonies may
With full and holy rite be ministered,
No sweet aspersion shall the heavens let fall
To make this contract grow, but barren hate,
Sour-eyed disdain, and discord shall bestrew
The union of your bed with weeds so loathly
That you shall hate it both. Therefore take heed,
As Hymen’s lamps shall light you.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
As I hope
For quiet days, fair issue, and long life,
With such love as ’tis now, the murkiest den,
The most opportune place, the strong’st suggestion,
Our worser genius can shall never melt
Mine honor into lust to take away
The edge of that day’s celebration
When I shall think, or Phoebus' steeds are foundered,
Or night kept chained below.

sentences.text:
Fairly spoke.
Sit then and talk with her. She is thine own.
What, Ariel! My industrious servant, Ariel!

ARIEL enters.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: What would my potent master? Here I am.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: What would my potent master? Here I am.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
Thou and thy meaner fellows your last service
Did worthily perform, and I must use you
In such another trick. Go bring the rabble,
O'er whom I give thee power, here to this place.
Incite them to quick motion, for I must
Bestow upon the eyes of this young couple
Some vanity of mine art. It is my promise,
And they expect it from me.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: Presently?

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text: Ay, with a twink.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text:
Before you can say “Come” and “Go,”
And breathe twice and cry “So, so!”
Each one, tripping on his toe,
Will be here with mop and mow.
Do you love me, master, no?

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
Dearly my delicate Ariel. Do not approach
Till thou dost hear me call.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
Dearly my delicate Ariel. Do not approach
Till thou dost hear me call.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: Well, I conceive.
ARIEL exits.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
[to FERDINAND] Look thou be true. Do not give dalliance
Too much the rein. The strongest oaths are straw
To th' fire i' th' blood. Be more abstemious,
Or else, goodnight your vow.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
I warrant you, sir,
The white cold virgin snow upon my heart
Abates the ardor of my liver.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
Well.
Now come, my Ariel! Bring a corollary,
Rather than want a spirit. Appear and pertly!—
No tongue. All eyes! Be silent.

IRIS enters.

sentences.speaker: IRIS
sentences.text:
Ceres, most bounteous lady, thy rich leas
Of wheat, rye, barley, vetches, oats, and peas;
Thy turfy mountains, where live nibbling sheep,
And flat meads thatched with stover, them to keep;
Thy banks with pionèd and twillèd brims,
Which spongy April at thy hest betrims
To make cold nymphs chaste crowns; and thy broom
groves,
Whose shadow the dismissèd bachelor loves,
Being lass-lorn; thy pole-clipped vineyard;
And thy sea-marge, sterile and rocky hard,
Where thou thyself dost air— the Queen o' th' Sky,
Whose watery arch and messenger am I,
Bids thee leave these, and with her sovereign grace,
Here on this grass plot, in this very place,
To come and sport. Her peacocks fly amain.

sentences.speaker: IRIS
sentences.text: Approach, rich Ceres, her to entertain.
CERES enters.

sentences.speaker: CERES
sentences.text:
Hail, many-colored messenger, that ne'er
Dost disobey the wife of Jupiter;
Who with thy saffron wings upon my flowers
Diffusest honey drops, refreshing showers;
And with each end of thy blue bow dost crown
My bosky acres and my unshrubbed down,
Rich scarf to my proud earth. Why hath thy queen
Summoned me hither to this short-grassed green?

sentences.speaker: IRIS
sentences.text:
A contract of true love to celebrate,
And some donation freely to estate
On the blessed lovers.

sentences.speaker: CERES
sentences.text:
Tell me, heavenly bow,
If Venus or her son, as thou dost know,
Do now attend the queen? Since they did plot
The means that dusky Dis my daughter got,
Her and her blind boy’s scandaled company
I have forsworn.

sentences.speaker: CERES
sentences.text:
Tell me, heavenly bow,

sentences.speaker: IRIS
sentences.text:
Of her society
Be not afraid. I met her deity
Cutting the clouds towards Paphos, and her son
Dove-drawn with her. Here thought they to have done
Some wanton charm upon this man and maid,
Whose vows are that no bed-right shall be paid
Till Hymen’s torch be lighted—but in vain.
Mars’s hot minion is returned again.
Her waspish-headed son has broke his arrows,
Swears he will shoot no more, but play with sparrows
And be a boy right out.

Highest queen of state,
Great Juno, comes. I know her by her gait.

sentences.speaker: JUNO
sentences.text:
How does my bounteous sister? Go with me
To bless this twain that they may prosperous be,
And honored in their issue.

sentences.speaker: JUNO
sentences.text:
How does my bounteous sister? Go with me
To bless this twain that they may prosperous be,
And honored in their issue.
They sing.

sentences.speaker: JUNO
sentences.text:
Honor, riches, marriage, blessing,
Long continuance, and increasing,
Hourly joys be still upon you.
Juno sings her blessings on you.

sentences.speaker: JUNO
sentences.text:
Honor, riches, marriage, blessing,
Long continuance, and increasing,
Hourly joys be still upon you.
Juno sings her blessings on you.

sentences.speaker: CERES
sentences.text:
Earth’s increase, foison plenty,
Barns and garners never empty,
Vines and clustering bunches growing,
Plants with goodly burden bowing—
Spring come to you at the farthest
In the very end of harvest.
Scarcity and want shall shun you.
Ceres' blessing so is on you.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
This is a most majestic vision, and
Harmonious charmingly. May I be bold
To think these spirits?

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
This is a most majestic vision, and
Harmonious charmingly. May I be bold
To think these spirits?

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
Spirits, which by mine art
I have from their confines called to enact
My present fancies.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
Let me live here ever.
So rare a wondered father and a wife
Makes this place paradise.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
Sweet now, silence.
Juno and Ceres whisper seriously.
There’s something else to do. Hush and be mute,
Or else our spell is marred.

sentences.speaker: IRIS
sentences.text:
You nymphs, called Naiads of the windring brooks,
With your sedged crowns and ever-harmless looks,
Leave your crisp channels and on this green land
Answer your summons, Juno does command.
Come, temperate nymphs, and help to celebrate
A contract of true love. Be not too late.

Answer your summons, Juno does command.

You
sunburnt sicklemen of August weary,
Come hither from the furrow and be merry.
Make holiday. Your rye-straw hats put on,
And these fresh nymphs encounter every one
In country footing.

I had forgot that foul conspiracy
Of the beast Caliban and his confederates
Against my life. The minute of their plot
Is almost come.— Well done. Avoid, no more!

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
[to MIRANDA] This is strange. Your father’s in some
passion
That works him strongly.

sentences.speaker: FERDINAND
sentences.text:
[to MIRANDA] This is strange. Your father’s in some
passion
That works him strongly.

sentences.speaker: MIRANDA
sentences.text:
Never till this day
Saw I him touched with anger so distempered.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
[to FERDINAND] You do look, my son, in a moved sort,
As if you were dismayed. Be cheerful, sir.
Our revels now are ended. These our actors,
As I foretold you, were all spirits and
Are melted into air, into thin air.
And like the baseless fabric of this vision,
The cloud-capped towers, the gorgeous palaces,
The solemn temples, the great globe itself,
Ye all which it inherit, shall dissolve,
And like this insubstantial pageant faded,
Leave not a rack behind. We are such stuff
As dreams are made on, and our little life
Is rounded with a sleep. Sir, I am vexed.
Bear with my weakness. My old brain is troubled.
Be not disturbed with my infirmity.
If you be pleased, retire into my cell
And there repose. A turn or two I’ll walk
To still my beating mind.

sentences.text: We wish your peace.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text: Come with a thought. I thank thee, Ariel. Come.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text: Come with a thought. I thank thee, Ariel. Come.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text: Come with a thought. I thank thee, Ariel. Come.
ARIEL enters.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: Thy thoughts I cleave to. What’s thy pleasure?

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text: Thy thoughts I cleave to. What’s thy pleasure?

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
Spirit,
We must prepare to meet with Caliban.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text:
Ay, my commander. When I presented Ceres,
I thought to have told thee of it, but I feared
Lest I might anger thee.

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text:
Ay, my commander. When I presented Ceres,
I thought to have told thee of it, but I feared
Lest I might anger thee.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text: Say again, where didst thou leave these varlets?

sentences.speaker: ARIEL
sentences.text:
I told you, sir, they were red-hot with drinking,
So full of valor that they smote the air
For breathing in their faces, beat the ground
For kissing of their feet; yet always bending
Towards their project. Then I beat my tabor,
At which, like unbacked colts, they pricked their ears,
Advanced their eyelids, lifted up their noses
As they smelt music. So I charmed their ears
That, calflike, they my lowing followed through
Toothed briers, sharp furzes, pricking gorse, and
thorns,
Which entered their frail shins. At last I left them
I' th' filthy-mantled pool beyond your cell,
There dancing up to th' chins, that the foul lake
O'erstunk their feet.

This was well done, my bird.
Thy shape invisible retain thou still.
The trumpery in my house, go bring it hither
For stale to catch these thieves.

sentences.speaker: PROSPERO
sentences.text:
A devil, a born devil on whose nature
Nurture can never stick, on whom my pains,
Humanely taken, all, all lost, quite lost.
And as with age his body uglier grows,
So his mind cankers. I will plague them all,
Even to roaring.

sentences.text: Come, hang them on this line.

CALIBAN, STEPHANO, and TRINCULO enter. They all are wet.
CALIBAN, STEPHANO, and TRINCULO enter. They all are wet.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Pray you, tread softly, that the blind mole may not
hear a foot fall. We now are near his cell.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Pray you, tread softly, that the blind mole may not
hear a foot fall. We now are near his cell.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
Monster, your fairy, which you say is a harmless fairy,
has done little better than played the jack with us.

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text:
Monster, I do smell all horse piss, at which my nose is
in great indignation.

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
So is mine. Do you hear, monster? If I should take a
displeasure against you, look you—

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
So is mine. Do you hear, monster? If I should take a
displeasure against you, look you—

sentences.speaker: STEPHANO
sentences.text:
So is mine. Do you hear, monster? If I should take a
displeasure against you, look you—

sentences.speaker: TRINCULO
sentences.text: Thou wert but a lost monster.

sentences.speaker: CALIBAN
sentences.text:
Good my lord, give me thy favor still.
Be patient, for the prize I’ll bring thee to
Shall hoodwink this mischance. Therefore speak softly.
All’s hushed as midnight yet.
